description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and publish that triggers on push with tags matching v*. The workflow should have three jobs: sdist on ubuntu-latest for source distribution, macos-wheels on macos-latest for Python wheels across multiple versions, and linux-wheels on ubuntu-latest with a manylinux container for Linux wheels across multiple Python versions. Each job should check out the repository, set up the respective Python version, cache pip, install dependencies, and then build and publish distributions to PyPI using twine with a TWINE_TOKEN from secrets.
